prestazioni: Engine: 6.0L W12 (engine code: **CW12**) twin-turbocharged with a **Garrett GT35R hybrid turbo upgrade** (compressor wheel: 62mm billet, turbine wheel: 70mm Inconel) paired with a **custom 4-inch titanium downpipe** (fabricated by **Armytrix**) and a **Milltek Sport 304 stainless steel cat-back exhaust** with 100mm tips for optimized backpressure reduction. Target boost: 22 psi (stock: 17.4 psi) with a **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management system for precise fueling and ignition mapping, including **Bosch Motorsport 2000cc injectors** and a **Radium Engineering dual-catch can system** to prevent oil vapor ingestion.

Suspension: **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (Bentley-specific valving) with **Eibach ERS race springs** (30% stiffer than OEM) and **Bilstein B16 dampers** for rebound adjustment. Front **H&R 25mm anti-roll bars** and rear **Whiteline 22mm adjustable sway bars** to reduce body roll. **Powerflex Black Series polyurethane bushings** (full subframe, control arms, and differential mounts) to eliminate compliance under load, paired with **Brembo GT 380mm front/356mm rear two-piece rotors** with **Pagid RSL29 race pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines**.

Drivetrain: **Quattro GmbH 40% limited-slip differential** (replacing the stock Torsen unit) with **Motul Gear 300 75W-140 synthetic gear oil** for reduced parasitic loss. **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc ceramic clutch** (rated for 1,200 lb-ft) with a **Spec billet flywheel** to handle increased torque. **034 Motorsport transmission mount insert** (aluminum) to minimize drivetrain deflection, paired with a **custom 3.71:1 final drive ratio** (stock: 3.34:1) for quicker acceleration. **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (275/35R21 front, 325/30R21 rear) on **BBS FI-R 21x10.5J/21x12.5J forged wheels** (ET35/ET40) for optimal grip.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (carbon fiber, Bentley-specific) with **custom 50mm front/70mm rear fender flares**, including **Vorsteiner carbon fiber front splitter** (3D-scanned for OEM fitment) and **Maxton Design GT-S rear diffuser** (dual-layer carbon, 4x100mm exhaust cutouts). **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (OEM-spec latches, 30% weight reduction) with **custom heat extractors** (vented for turbo cooling).

**Rotiform LAS-R 21-inch wheels** (matte bronze finish, 10.5J/12.5J widths) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect tires** (semi-slick compound) with **HRE FlowForm FF03 concave centers**. **LuxuryTec LED headlight retrofit** (Bi-LED projectors, 5,000K color temperature) with **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** (3,000K amber for contrast). **Custom matte PPF (Paint Protection Film)** in **3M 1080 Matte Satin Black** with **ceramic coating (Gyeon Quartz)** for UV resistance.

**Interior: Recaro Pole Position carbon fiber bucket seats** (Bentley-specific mounting brackets) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** (FIA-approved). **MOMO Mod.78 carbon fiber steering wheel** (flat-bottom, Alcantara grip) with **AiM MXS Strada dash logger** (integrated with Motec ECU). **Roll cage: Custom **Custom Cages** bolt-in 6-point cage (T45 steel, powder-coated satin black) with **Sparco Pro2000 fire suit** and **OMP HTE-R racing seats** (optional). **Full Alcantara headliner** (Bentley-approved) with **LED ambient lighting (LuxuryTec RGB kit)** and **carbon fiber door cards** (replacing wood trim).
